import re, unicodedata, math

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_re = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
punct_re = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]')  # remove punctuation but keep Arabic letters/numbers/underscore? We'll also remove _.

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = s.strip()
    # normalize common variances
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ٰ','')  # dagger alif
    s = tatweel_re.sub('', s)
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    s = punct_re.sub(' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    return s.strip()

def remove_diacritics(s):
    return arabic_diacritics.sub('', s or '')

orig_span = "لا تَزالُ طَاعةُ مُؤْمِنٍ مُؤْمِناً طَاعةً وَلَوْ أَمرَهُ بِالْإِجْحَاضِ"
